Interface Lease<T>

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, com.teragrep.stb_01.Stubable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenableLease<T>, TrackedLease<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
MemorySegmentLease, MemorySegmentLeaseStub, MemorySegmentSubLease, TrackedMemorySegmentLease
public interface Lease<T> extends AutoCloseable, com.teragrep.stb_01.Stubable

  • Method Details

    • id

      long id()
      Returns:
      id of the leased object

    • refs

      long refs()
      Returns:
      current reference count

    • leasedObject

      T leasedObject()
      Returns:
      encapsulated leased object

    • hasZeroRefs

      boolean hasZeroRefs()
      Returns:
      status of the lease, true indicates that the lease has expired.

    • sliceAt

      Lease<T> sliceAt(long offset)
      Provides a slice from the offset to the end of the segment. Registered as a sub lease.
      Parameters:
      offset - start offset
      Returns:
      slice of the lease, registered as a sublease.

    • close

      void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
